ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., SZ000666) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., ETF, mutual fund) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock_exchanges table */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for currency conversion */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., researcher, portfolio manager) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report" TEXT /* Content of the research report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of research report */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating assigned to the stock by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_tracker" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_tracker_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_tracker_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market news */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the market news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trend was identified */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of market trend */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector associated with the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "object_affected" TEXT /* Object affected by the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data feed */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)
